title: diasperus calocarpus
intro: Diasperus calocarpus, also known as the desert calotrope or calotrope, is a type of flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Diasperus calocarpus include treating wounds, reducing fever, and relieving digestive issues. Diasperus calocarpus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
